cases.passage: In a small town, a local bank has started a 'Business Loan Counseling Service' to help entrepreneurs and small business owners get loans from the bank. This service provides guidance and support to applicants throughout the loan application process. The counseling service has been successful in increasing the number of loan applications and has also helped the bank to understand the needs of the local businesses. The bank has now started to offer a 'Business Advisory Service' where experts from the bank provide advice on business planning, marketing, and financial management to the loan applicants. The advisory service has been well-received by the local businesses, and the bank has seen a significant increase in the number of successful businesses in the town.

questions.q: What is the purpose of the 'Business Loan Counseling Service' started by the local bank?
opts: (A) To increase the number of loan applications
(B) To provide guidance and support to loan applicants
(D) To provide financial assistance to entrepreneurs
questions.explanation: The bank's 'Business Loan Counseling Service' aims to provide guidance and support to loan applicants throughout the loan application process.

questions.q: What is the outcome of the 'Business Loan Counseling Service' started by the local bank?
opts: (A) The number of loan applications has decreased
(B) The number of loan applications has increased
(C) The bank has lost money on loans
questions.explanation: The counseling service has been successful in increasing the number of loan applications.

questions.q: What is the objective of the 'Business Advisory Service' offered by the bank?
opts: (A) To provide financial assistance to entrepreneurs
(B) To offer business planning, marketing, and financial management advice
(C) To increase the number of loan applications
questions.explanation: Experts from the bank provide advice on business planning, marketing, and financial management to the loan applicants.

questions.q: What is the outcome of the 'Business Advisory Service' offered by the bank?
opts: (A) The number of successful businesses in the town has decreased
(B) The number of successful businesses in the town has increased
(C) The bank has lost money on loans
questions.explanation: The bank has seen a significant increase in the number of successful businesses in the town.

questions.q: What is the benefit of the 'Business Loan Counseling Service' and 'Business Advisory Service' offered by the local bank?
opts: (B) Increased number of successful businesses in the town
questions.explanation: The bank has seen a significant increase in the number of successful businesses in the town.

cases.passage: A popular clothing brand, 'Trendy Wear', has started a 'Wardrobe Consultation Service' where experts provide advice on fashion trends, style, and grooming to customers. The service includes a personalized wardrobe analysis, fashion advice, and product recommendations. The brand has also introduced a 'Alteration and Repair Service' where customers can get their clothes altered, repaired, or customized to fit their needs. This service has been well-received by customers, and the brand has seen an increase in sales and customer loyalty.

questions.q: What is the objective of the 'Wardrobe Consultation Service' offered by 'Trendy Wear'?
opts: (A) To increase sales and customer loyalty
(B) To provide fashion advice and product recommendations
(C) To offer alteration and repair services
questions.explanation: Experts provide advice on fashion trends, style, and grooming to customers.

questions.q: What is the outcome of the 'Wardrobe Consultation Service' offered by 'Trendy Wear'?
questions.explanation: The service has been well-received by customers, and the brand has seen an increase in customer satisfaction.

questions.q: What is the benefit of the 'Alteration and Repair Service' offered by 'Trendy Wear'?
questions.explanation: The service has been well-received by customers, and the brand has seen an increase in sales and customer loyalty.

questions.q: What is the purpose of the 'Alteration and Repair Service' offered by 'Trendy Wear'?
opts: (A) To provide fashion advice and product recommendations
(B) To offer alteration and repair services
(C) To increase sales and customer loyalty
questions.explanation: Customers can get their clothes altered, repaired, or customized to fit their needs.

questions.q: What is the outcome of the 'Alteration and Repair Service' offered by 'Trendy Wear'?
questions.explanation: The service has been well-received by customers, and the brand has seen an increase in customer satisfaction.
